venue: Binance USD-M perpetual futures with Binance spot confirmation
decision_clock: each completed quarter-hour first-10-second aggregate-trade window
entry: first actual USD-M aggregate trade after boundary+10 seconds

C_basis.signal: abs(prior-only 1440-minute contract/spot basis z) >= 3, hours 12-15 UTC inclusive

A_ridge4h.model: monthly walk-forward Ridge(alpha=1000), raw 240-minute return target, previous 90 days only
A_ridge4h.protective_stop: 2 * prior 60-minute realized volatility * sqrt(60), clipped to 0.3%-5%

B_extra12h.model: monthly walk-forward ExtraTrees(n_estimators=120,max_depth=6,min_samples_leaf=300,max_features=0.55,random_state=27), raw 720-minute target, previous 90 days only
B_extra12h.direction_filter: predicted direction agrees with first-10-second imbalance and price return; prior completed spot and futures taker flow do not oppose

screening_execution.adverse_stop_gap: actual minute open if beyond stop, otherwise stop
screening_execution.boundary_minute: included conservatively; exact candidate-day aggregate-trade replay required after OOS pass
screening_execution.missing_minute: cancel entry or reject trade; no next-available-bar substitution
screening_execution.segment_boundary: no feature, entry, holding, or exit may cross

selection_disclosure.mitigation: three economically distinct components, both symbols, all three development half-years, 20/30bp stress, unified global router, and untouched 2025 one-shot OOS
selection_disclosure.not_claimed: development metrics are not an unbiased estimate of future performance

oos_promotion_gate.result_if_passed: exact candidate-day aggTrade protective-stop replay, exact funding accounting, external-venue shadow replay, then untouched next holdout
